title: Upstream issue replay: nested empty params

source.reportedBehavior: axios.get('/url', { params: { limit: 100, address: { city: {} }, details: { name: {} } } }) omitted the nested empty object parameters from the transmitted request.

prompt: repair an upstream issue replay for Axios-style query serialization so nested empty object params are preserved as explicit empty assignments without regressing normal nested params or array params
